about.en: Aerodrome Finance is a decentralized exchange and liquidity hub on Base. AERO is used for incentives, governance, and emissions within the Aerodrome ecosystem. The protocol is a major venue for liquidity and swaps in the Base network.
about.es: Aerodrome Finance es un exchange descentralizado y centro de liquidez en Base. AERO se utiliza para incentivos, gobernanza y emisiones dentro del ecosistema Aerodrome. El protocolo es un venue importante para liquidez y swaps en la red Base.
about.ca: Aerodrome Finance es un exchange descentralitzat i centre de liquiditat a Base. AERO s'utilitza per a incentius, governança i emissions dins l'ecosistema Aerodrome. El protocol es un venue important per a liquiditat i swaps a la xarxa Base.
